page.title: Margin & FX
page.subtitle: Realized margin per kilo of green coffee, lot by lot. The number that closes the loop, over the canonical FX rate book.

empty.title: No realized margin yet
empty.description: Once a lot earns revenue and its cost is on the books, its true per-kilo margin lands here.

card.marginPendingNote: Revenue is booked. Add this lot's cost in Costing to reveal its true margin.

fx.title: FX rate book
fx.subtitle: One place a rate lives, never hardcoded. The free ECB daily feed, with manual entry as the no-cost fallback.
fx.empty: No FX rates recorded. USD-settled lots need none. Record a rate the day a non-USD document is raised.

form.title: Record an FX rate
form.intro: The canonical daily rate the books use to value a non-USD document. A deliberate, human-entered figure, the no-cost fallback to the free ECB feed.
form.rateHint: One unit of the base in the quote currency, for example 1.08 USD per EUR.

errors.baseRequired: Enter the base currency, for example EUR.
errors.ratePositive: The rate must be greater than zero.
errors.dateRequired: Pick the date the rate applies to.
errors.duplicate: A rate for that day and currency pair is already on the books.
errors.access: You do not have access to record FX rates.
errors.generic: Could not record that rate. Check the values and try again.
